name: Allen, Mary Elizabeth
motto: "She is pleasant with all, She is jolly with each, The school will be fortunate, That gets her to teach."
text: "She is pleasant with all, She is jolly with each, The school will be fortunate, That gets her to teach."

name: Ball, M. H.
motto: "What is put into the first of life is put into the whole."
clubs: Reporter and Critic for Prestonian Literary Society '21
Member of Y. M. C. A. and Tennis Club '21
text: "What is put into the first of life is put into the whole."

name: Barefoot, C. C.
clubs: Editor In Chief of Normal College News '21-22
three times President of Platonian Literary Society
Cabinet Member of Y. M. C. A. '21-22
description: His favorite greeting to fellow students: "Boys, what have you got to eat?"
text: His favorite greeting to fellow students: "Boys, what have you got to eat?"

name: Belk, Zack C.
motto: "Let every man be persuaded in his own mind."
text: "Let every man be persuaded in his own mind."

name: Cook, Ethel
motto:
"Ethel, the girl with many friends,
Has the charm that always wins."
clubs: Member Y. W. C. A. Cabinet '20-21
Secretary Hattiesburg Hall Story Tellers' League '21-22
text:
"Ethel, the girl with many friends,
Has the charm that always wins."

name: Darby, J. J.
motto: "None but himself can be his parallel."
clubs: College and Prestonian Society Debating Teams, '20-21
Y. M. C. A. Representative to Blue Ridge '21
description: Attended M. N. C. in '16-17, one term; '19-20, two terms; '20-21, '21-22, whole session.
text:
"None but himself can be his parallel."
Attended M. N. C. in '16-17, one term; '19-20, two terms; '20-21, '21-22, whole session.

name: Davis, Jesse A.
motto: "The world makes a way for the determined man."
clubs: Member of Y. M. C. A. Cabinet '21
text: "The world makes a way for the determined man."

name: Davis, William Jefferson
motto: "Never let your studies interfere with your college life."
hometown: Pearl River, La.; St. Tammany Parish
text: "Never let your studies interfere with your college life."

name: Edwards, A. G.
motto: "He lives to build and not to boast a generous race."
text: "He lives to build and not to boast a generous race."

name: Flurry, Hubert
motto: "Here's to Jelly, the noted Proctor, The rural schools, they need a Doctor, Jelly is ready, We'll send him out, 'Function Gang'! You'll hear him shout."
clubs: Vice President of Gulf Coast Club '21-22
text: "Here's to Jelly, the noted Proctor, The rural schools, they need a Doctor, Jelly is ready, We'll send him out, 'Function Gang'! You'll hear him shout."

name: French, W. D.
motto: "In idle wishes fools supinely stay. Be there a will then wisdom finds a way."
clubs: Vice President of Prestonian Literary Society '20
Secretary of Y. M. C. A. '21-22
Member of Honor Council and Class Poet '21-22
text: "In idle wishes fools supinely stay. Be there a will then wisdom finds a way."

name: Fugitt, Audie F.
motto: "And thus he bore without abuse The grand old name of gentleman."
clubs: Vice President Masonic Club two years
Vice President Y. M. C. A. '20-21
text: "And thus he bore without abuse The grand old name of gentleman."

name: Haddon, Sam T.
motto: "Sam is a man we look up to, In all his ways we find him true."
clubs: President, Story Tellers' League and Old Testament Bible Class '21-22
Vice President, Y. M. C. A. '21-22
text: "Sam is a man we look up to, In all his ways we find him true."

name: Herrington, Bessie Mae
motto: "She takes the Sunday with her Thru the week And sweetens with it All the other days."
clubs: Member, Mississippi Hall Story Tellers' League, Methods in Bible
text: "She takes the Sunday with her Thru the week And sweetens with it All the other days."

name: James, Mattie
motto: "Her heart is as great as the world, but there is no room in it to hold the Memory of a wrong."
clubs: Member, Social Committee and Y. W. C. A.
Member, Mississippi Hall Story Tellers' League
Member, Bible Classes (Bible Study and The Life of Christ) Tennis Club
text: "Her heart is as great as the world, but there is no room in it to hold the Memory of a wrong."

name: Lott, H. V.
motto: "The surest pledge of a deathless name is the silent homage of thoughts unspoken."
text: "The surest pledge of a deathless name is the silent homage of thoughts unspoken."

name: Mattox, Otis A.
description: He has never been known to be impatient, disappointed or angry during his college years. His ambition is to live to be one hundred years of age.
text: He has never been known to be impatient, disappointed or angry during his college years. His ambition is to live to be one hundred years of age.

name: Mattox, F. B.
motto: "Study moments are as jewels, they reflect in the individual the shining light of knowledge."
clubs: Vice President and President of Platonian Literary Society '17-18
text: "Study moments are as jewels, they reflect in the individual the shining light of knowledge."

name: McClesky, J. W.
motto: "I have a heart with room for every joy."
text: "I have a heart with room for every joy."

name: Oaks, O. C.
motto: "Then he will talk. Ye gods, how he will talk."
text: "Then he will talk. Ye gods, how he will talk."

name: Purvis, S. J.
motto: "The married man is no drone bee, He is the Guy in the Shute."
clubs: Member of the House of Representatives '16-20
text: "The married man is no drone bee, He is the Guy in the Shute."

name: Ritter, A. H.
motto: "He is genial in smile, agreeable in spirit and does good deeds that no other can do."
clubs: Member of Y. M. C. A. Cabinet '21
text: "He is genial in smile, agreeable in spirit and does good deeds that no other can do."

name: Shipp, Amy Carl
motto: "Oh do not pray for easy lives. Pray to be stronger men! Do not pray for tasks equal to your powers, Pray for powers equal to your tasks."
clubs: Member of Y. W. C. A.
Vice President of Salsbury Scholarship Club
text: "Oh do not pray for easy lives. Pray to be stronger men! Do not pray for tasks equal to your powers, Pray for powers equal to your tasks."

name: Shirley, J. E.
motto: "Sincere in thought, honest in action, With a heart ever kind and true."
clubs: Vice President, Secretary, Chaplain Prestonian Literary Society
House Chairman of F. Co. Hall
text: "Sincere in thought, honest in action, With a heart ever kind and true."

name: Sigrest, Julia
motto: "Service is the greatest of all deeds."
description: Julia is one of our busy members of the class. She is always found lending a helping hand in Literary Society, Story Tellers' League and Y. W. C. A. work.
text:
"Service is the greatest of all deeds."
Julia is one of our busy members of the class. She is always found lending a helping hand in Literary Society, Story Tellers' League and Y. W. C. A. work.

name: Suggs, Joel D.
clubs: Vice President of Platonian Literary Society '21-22
Member of Y. M. C. A. Cabinet '21-22
text: Greatest hobby "My wife."

name: Sumrall, T. D.
motto: "Work some. Play some, and take social hour too, All make you happy and you will not be blue."
clubs: Secretary and Vice President of Literary Society '21-22
Member of Y. M. C. A. Cabinet '21-22
text: "Work some. Play some, and take social hour too, All make you happy and you will not be blue."

name: Bessie, Taylor
motto: "Do what thy womanhood bids thee do. From none but self expect applause. The noblest lives and the noblest dies Who makes and keeps her selfmade laws."
text:
"Do what thy womanhood bids thee do. From none but self expect applause. The noblest lives and the noblest dies Who makes and keeps her selfmade laws."
Leake County.

name: Wells, Sallie Elizabeth
motto: "Smooth runs the water where the brook is deep."
clubs: Vice President Mississippian Literary Society, one term
text:
"Smooth runs the water where the brook is deep."
Newton County.

name: Williams, Walter B.
motto: "The man with an idea has even changed the face of the world."
text:
"The man with an idea has even changed the face of the world."
Walter is a loyal Prestonian.

name: Woods, Ernest H.
motto: "Who mixed wisdom with mirth, Work with play?"
clubs: Delegate International Y. M. C. A. Convention at Detroit '20
text:
"Who mixed wisdom with mirth, Work with play?"
Forrest County.
